title: poa longifolia
intro: Poa longifolia, also known as the blue grass or long-leaved meadow grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the temperate regions of the Northern Hemisphere. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa longifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Poa longifolia include tea infusions, tinctures, and infusions in hot water, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues.
